summary: Add an enforced scheduler-independent loop state machine while preserving report-only L1 and no-auto-merge L2 policy.

migration.note: Existing targets preview and apply loop-sync once; sync adds missing machine runtime files and preserves all existing runtime data.

compatibility.note: L1 stays report-only and L2 stays human-approved, worktree-isolated, verifier-gated, and no-auto-merge.
